race.comment: TEN CARAT LUCY (11) is another strong winning chance for the potent Wiggins-Taylor linkage. Has threatened at Rockhampton both starts this preparation and didn't have the best of it over this trip the latest. Is sure to keep improving and will come hard. FLYING ANIMO (1) comes out of the same race and disappointed as a $2.9 favourite. Brought strong form to that and from an inside barrier, will get every chance to make amends. BADLIFEDECISION (13) turned the form around winning a Rockhampton Maiden comfortably over this distance. Draws low again and would only need to hold that form to get some of the better money. WAR COUNCIL (6) resumed off a longish break with a near miss at Townsville. Proven seconds up, and Butler replaces Wiggins. He's in the mix.
